mapper.update: update clazz set name = #{name}, grade_id = #{gradeId} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select c.id, c.name, c.grade_id as gradeId, g.name as gradeName from clazz c left join grade g on c.grade_id = g.id where c.id = #{id}
select c.id, c.name, c.grade_id as gradeId, g.name as gradeName from clazz c left join grade g on c.grade_id = g.id

select c.id, c.name, c.grade_id as gradeId, g.name as gradeName from clazz c left join grade g on c.grade_id = g.id
and c.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and g.name like concat('%', #{grade}, '%')
